function.name: get_market_movers
function.description: Get top gainers and losers from a stock watchlist.
function.long_description: Retrieves daily market movers from a predefined stock watchlist and returns top gainers and top losers based on percentage price change.

limit.description: Number of gainers and losers to return

example_user_queries: List the top 15 stocks moving the market.
Give me the top 20 gainers and losers.
What are the top 25 market movers right now?
Pull a list of 7 market movers.
Return market movers limited to 9 entries.
